suite.name: Pdv

kw.name: Suite Setup Default
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open App
Open App Session
Get Device UDID From Tag
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.
Retorna o UDID do dispositivo a ser usado na sessão Appium.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=emulator-5554 | tag= | systemPort=8200 | appiumServer=http://192.168.20.181:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-05-20 17:21:19
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_CONNECT] Conectando ao dispositivo | udid=emulator-5554 | tag= | systemPort=8200 | appiumServer=http://192.168.20.181:4723/wd/hub | timestamp=2026-05-20 17:21:19
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: UiAutomator2 Server cannot start because the local port #8200 is busy. Make sure the port you provide via 'systemPort' capability is not occupied. This situation might often be a result of an inaccurate sessions management, e.g. old automation sessions on the same device must always be closed before starting new ones. Stacktrace: UnknownError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: UiAutomator2 Server cannot start because the local port #8200 is busy. Make sure the port you provide via 'systemPort' capability is not occupied. kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.doc: Abre a sessão Appium no dispositivo resolvido. Conecta ao device sem lançar nem resetar o app — o app deve estar aberto em foreground. Configurações de system_port e appium_server são lidas do devices.yaml via DevicesConfig.py.

kw.name: Clear Logcat
kw.doc: Clears the Android logcat buffer for the current device.

test.name: Pdv - Search for order by name, reference, and barcode
test.doc: Realiza busca por um item pelo nome, referencia e codigo de barras.
test.status:
Parent suite setup failed: Falha ao abrir a aplicação: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: UiAutomator2 Server cannot start because the local port #8200 is busy. Make sure the port you provide via 'systemPort' capability is not occupied. This situation might often be a result of an inaccurate sessions management, e.g. old automation sessions on the same device must always be closed before starting new ones. kw.name: Suite Teardown Default
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close App
Close Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${formatted} = [APP_CLOSE_FAILED] Falha ao encerrar sessão | error=No application is open | timestamp=2026-05-20 17:21:28
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: [APP_CLOSE_FAILED] Falha ao encerrar sessão | error=No application is open | timestamp=2026-05-20 17:21:28
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Keyword de Test/Suite Teardown — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.
Teardown padrão de suite — encerra a sessão Appium com segurança.

suite.doc:
Suite de regressão — módulo Pdv (Smart PDV)
Cobre os fluxos principais de pedidos, cancelamentos, descontos, remoção de itens, ticket, lista de pedidos e sincronização. Pré-condição: app iniciado na tela inicial do Smart PDV.
suite.status:
Suite setup failed: Falha ao abrir a aplicação: WebDriverException: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: UiAutomator2 Server cannot start because the local port #8200 is busy. Make sure the port you provide via 'systemPort' capability is not occupied. This situation might often be a result of an inaccurate sessions management, e.g. old automation sessions on the same device must always be closed before starting new ones.
